zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery De Fulthorpe於大約1300年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆達林頓時，她的父親Sir Roger de Fulthorpe16歲，母親Lady Alice le Blount21歲。她於1328年與Sir Henry Langton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1356年在英國英格蘭達勒姆雷德馬沙拉爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery De Fulthorpe于大约1300年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆達林頓时，她的父亲Sir Roger de Fulthorpe16岁，母亲Lady Alice le Blount21岁。她于1328年与Sir Henry Langton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1356年在英国英格兰達勒姆雷德馬沙拉爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fulthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Fulthorpe in Grindon by Stockton on Tees (Durham).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery De Fulthorpe was born about 1300, in Darlington, Durham, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Roger de Fulthorpe, was 16 and her mother, Lady Alice le Blount, was 21. She married Sir Henry Langton in 1328. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1356, in Redmarshall, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery De Fulthorpe est née environ 1300, à Darlington, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger de Fulthorpe, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice le Blount, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Langton en 1328. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1356, à Redmarshall, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery De Fulthorpe um 1300 in Darlington, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger de Fulthorpe 16 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice le Blount 21. Sie hat 1328 Sir Henry Langton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1356 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Redmarshall, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery De Fulthorpe è nata il circa 1300 nel Darlington, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Roger de Fulthorpe, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice le Blount, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Langton nel 1328. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1356, nel Redmarshall, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery De Fulthorpeが約1300年にイギリスイギリスダルハムダルリントンで生まれた時，父Sir Roger de Fulthorpeは16歳，母Lady Alice le Blountは21歳であった。1328年にSir Henry Langtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1356年にイギリスイギリスダルハムレドマーシャルで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery De Fulthorpe(이)가 대략 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 더를링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger de Fulthorpe(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice le Blount(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1328년 Sir Henry Langton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1356년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 레드마샤에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery De Fulthorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Darlington, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Roger de Fulthorpe, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice le Blount, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Langton em 1328. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1356, em Redmarshall, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery De Fulthorpe родилась около 1300 г. в местности дарлингтон, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Roger de Fulthorpe было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice le Blount, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Langton в 1328 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1356 г. в местности редмаршолл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery De Fulthorpe nació aproximadamente 1300, en Darlington, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Roger de Fulthorpe, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Lady Alice le Blount, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Henry Langton en 1328. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1356, en Redmarshall, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
